summary: Fixed Layer 4 (detectFabricatedRefs) false-positives by skipping paths whose finding text contains explicit missing-file language (e.g. 'does not exist', 'is absent', 'is missing'). Added detailed JSDoc to Layer 5 (detectAspirationalClaims) explaining why critical-severity findings are excluded from the aspirational-claims check. Updated the affected test and added 3 new tests covering the false-positive guard; all 476 tests pass.
